name: S.o.s.
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown ground beef in a skillet until cooked through.
2. Remove all but 2-3 tablespoons of fat from the skillet using a slotted spoon or spatula.
3. On the side of the skillet, mix in flour until smooth and browned.
4. Gradually add milk to the flour mixture while stirring continuously.
5. Add salt and pepper to taste.
6. Bring the mixture to a boil and stir until it reaches the desired thickness.
7. Serve the sauce over hot buttered toast.
